channel.title: Victor on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in Victor on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Introducing the Plakar Control Plane free plan: Open Resilience for everyone, deployed on your terms
item.description: We’re launching a free plan for our first commercial product, Plakar Control Plane — a self-hosted backup management platform built on top of open-source Plakar. Fully functional, no time limit, deployed on infrastructure you own.
